name: galaxy-screen-grid-format-msgdat-boundaryfix
description: Fix the remaining RE-confirmed in-world ConstMsg lookup that crosses from group 0x16 into the group 0x17 grid-label table.
verified: ENCODED 2026-06-21: FUN_0053f2d0 builds a 3-row text list and calls FUN_00522010 as g0x16/s0x77, g0x16/s0x7b, g0x16/s0x78. g0x16 ends at sub0x7a, so only the middle row crosses the constmsg group boundary. Its original flat index is 1399, which is group 0x17/sub0 (플라스마 폭풍 그리드). Same-length branch/local immediate rewiring only; no speculative records are added.

patches.note: FUN_0053f2d0 middle-row branch: route i==1 to the local g0x17/s0 path at 0x0054338b
FUN_0053f2d0 third-row branch: keep i==2 on the original g0x16/s0x78 path after local layout rewrite
Rewrite the unused default slot into g0x17/s0 (flat constmsg 1399: 플라스마 폭풍 그리드); preserve g0x16/s0x78 and g0x16/s0x77
